title: Qs original story stage greeting with Anno split
display_title: Qs original story stage greeting with Anno split
wikitext:
[]: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Jul 11, 2021 7:20 am Some stuff from the new stage greeting with Anno: tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) tweet-body — twitter-user (@username) date document.querySelectorAll('blockquote.twitter-tweet > a').forEach((t) => t.href = t.href.replace('x.com', 'twitter.com')) https://twitter.com/shirasuch_/status/1 ... 8087111680 - Q was supposed to not feature Shinji at all - ultimately Anno thought it would be bad for the film if the main character wouldn't appear at all and hence Q's start was changed to when Shinji "wakes up", giving birth to lost 14 years - Gendo and Fuyutsuki disappear, Kaworu and Kaji take the reins - There are no details for the lost 14 years but scenario for them exists. Preview at the end of Ha is from that story. - Naoko Akagi's settei wasn't written down with details and she was removed from NTE entirely

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 11, 2021 7:46 am ^ DeepL gives me something a little different : I heard that Anno had a plan to make a movie about the 14 years of the gap between Q and the rest of the series, and not show Shinji-kun in the movie at all, which surprised Emi Ogata, who played Shinji-kun. In the end, that story disappeared and it became the story of Q, but I would love to see the details of that side story on film or even in writing.

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Jul 11, 2021 8:07 am ElMariachi wrote: The tweet with the arrows is the chain of events right after Ha, leading to Actual Third Impact (my comments in bold): Near-surface activation at break (No idea what it's talking about, Google trad gives me "Near sir activated by defeat", maybe it's "Near Third is activated at (the end of) Ha"?) -> Gendou loses his position -> Kaworu and Kaji act as acting commanders and assistants to maintain the NERV and protect Misato and the others while Gendou is out of power -> Gendou somehow returns as NERV commander -> Gendou uses Zele (I suppose it's SEELE) or fights with her to cause the Third -> Kaji dies to stop the Third -> WILLE starts up -> to Q, I really want to see this story!

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 11, 2021 8:17 am Konja7 wrote: Maybe I'm mistaken, but I think that part is only opinion of twitter user. That's why the user doesn't know if Gendo uses or figths SEELE for the Third Impact. The user doesn't mentioned Anno said that in the greeting.

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jul 11, 2021 8:59 am So there IS a definite sequence of events to be puzzled out there. I do like the idea that actual TI was Gendo's last ditch effort to stop SEELE. Or is the implication that he worked with them out of desperation? I did have the impression that Kaji got to stay when Gendo left & everyone else was imprisoned because he'd been on SEELE's payroll but then used that position to help Misato's rebellion - I like the detail that he & Kaworu were explicitly protecting/helping them tho. There was lost potential there with Misato maybe thinking he'd betrayed them just as she notices she's pregnant, but then in the end he helps them & she finds he was on their side all along, but he dies soon after, & maybe Misato is left feeling doubt that she could've prevented shit if she had trusted him & kaworu more. Same as with Mari getting to know her & Asuka... 2.0 basically seems to set up conflict between them with Mari stealing Asuka's EVA, remarking on the "nice smell" & Misato commenting on Mari's loner attitude but forced to launch her anyways cause they're out of options. I do hope we'll see the drafts published eventually. I so wish to know what Mari was discussing with the Reis, everything else we can more or less figure The "movie with no Shinji" is something that wouldn't work for a tetralogy cause it would break the flow too much, but which could have worked if they had made it a bunch of OVAs (and also plit 2.0 in 2 with one movie largely like the one we got (with the extra time used for cut Misato stuff) and another focussing more on Asuka & Mari & ending with the sahaquiel battle, using all the draft stuff & supposed cut Asuka stuff) My ideal repackaging of the Rebuild would be 7 90ish minute Ovas: 1. 1.0 2. The Asuka & Mari movie (with epp 11's worth of Rei stuff maybe), ending with the sahaquiel battle - including the bit where Mari participates in that fight & Asuka feeds her noodles afterwards. End with the sleepover scene. 3. more or less the rest 2.0 as we know it, except the 1st half hour is swapped for more Misato stuff and also the extended bardiel scene with Asuka's face ripping off. Also put the reishin kiss back in, like i specifically want that ultra weird scenario of the angel goo Rei kissing eva 01 4. The interim movie 5. Q 6. The village section of Final 7. The grand finale

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Jul 11, 2021 10:51 am I know that it probably would've break the narrative's flow (much like the excellent live action scenes from EOE), but c'mon! I would've killed for a movie without Shinji! Frankly, NTE is already disjointed by nature (both in tone and overall structure). So whatever! Damn, that's all I really wanted, to be honest. Give me more Misato and Asuka! These are interesting characters (one of them is essentially brand new). Maybe take this opportunity to make me care about Mari and give Kaji's character a proper conclusion. Heck, even Kaworu could've benefited from more screen time. Sure, he works best under a limited time frame. But that's the case for the original series (in which the "monster of the week formula" was at play). Oh well. I'm not sad because we didn't get to see this version of the movie. It's insane to be sad over something that simply doesn't exist (lol). I personally don't care too much about Q. So I wouldn't mind if it was replaced by this. It sounds amazing in paper. Maybe Khara could've pulled it off. The only downside is that Q and Shin's events would probably be crammed into the same movie (psychedelic). I personally wanted to know how Mari and Asuka became friends, how Kensuke and Asuka became roommates (to the point of him being so important to her), how Misato felt about being pregnant and Kaji's position at Nerv, how Kaji and Kaworu felt about each other and their goals and what Gendo did during his exile. Also, what's up with Fuyutsuki's donkey, of course. I'm not asking for a beautiful psychologic and philosophical journey (like the one seen in NGE). Just show me more about the world! Don't get me wrong, I'm not complaining about what we got. This all sounds incredibly interesting, though! Maybe the fact that it's a mystery makes everything even more intriguing.

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Jul 11, 2021 11:07 am I would like to know more about how Kaworu and Kaji work together. And how they try to protect Misato and the others. Also, I would like to know how the events for the Third Impact were developed. And what connection it has with the Near Third Impact. There is also a Rei clone likely having a role in the Q movie without Shinji. Maybe even an explanation why Rei's soul has long hair in Shin. I really want to know the details about this movie that doesn't exist.

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Jul 11, 2021 11:18 am I turned this section of "Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized" into its own thread so we can discuss the situation "freely".

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Jul 11, 2021 11:39 am That's all really interesting and confirms the HA preview was indeed the events of the timeskip. I'm personally fine with how it turned out, while I know a lot of people were unhappy with 3.0, I found it very effective in creating a feeling of loneliness and desperation.

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jul 11, 2021 12:43 pm Yeah, the emotional torque was unparalleled and I'm not sure it could have worked that way if we'd seen what the others were up to. This is just a definite conformation for things that we more or less already had puzzled out

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 11, 2021 1:38 pm Kendrix wrote: My ideal repackaging of the Rebuild would be 7 90ish minute Ovas: 1. 1.0 2. The Asuka & Mari movie (with epp 11's worth of Rei stuff maybe), ending with the sahaquiel battle - including the bit where Mari participates in that fight & Asuka feeds her noodles afterwards. End with the sleepover scene. 3. more or less the rest 2.0 as we know it, except the 1st half hour is swapped for more Misato stuff and also the extended bardiel scene with Asuka's face ripping off. Also put the reishin kiss back in, like i specifically want that ultra weird scenario of the angel goo Rei kissing eva 01 4. The interim movie 5. Q 6. The village section of Final 7. The grand finale

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by Konja7 » Sun Jul 11, 2021 1:59 pm Kendrix wrote: Yeah, the emotional torque was unparalleled and I'm not sure it could have worked that way if we'd seen what the others were up to.

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Jul 11, 2021 3:07 pm Kendrix wrote: Yeah, the emotional torque was unparalleled and I'm not sure it could have worked that way if we'd seen what the others were up to.

[]: Re: Shin Eva-Official Social Media: 3.33 You Can (Not) Be Localized             Quote Post by UrsusArctos » Sun Jul 11, 2021 9:08 pm ElMariachi wrote: ^ The tweet with the arrows is the chain of events right after Ha, leading to Actual Third Impact (my comments in bold): Near-surface activation at break (No idea what it's talking about, Google trad gives me "Near sir activated by defeat", maybe it's "Near Third is activated at (the end of) Ha"?) -> Gendou loses his position -> Kaworu and Kaji act as acting commanders and assistants to maintain the NERV and protect Misato and the others while Gendou is out of power -> Gendou somehow returns as NERV commander -> Gendou uses Zele (I suppose it's SEELE) or fights with her to cause the Third -> Kaji dies to stop the Third -> WILLE starts up -> to Q, I really want to see this story!

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by BernardoCairo » Sun Jul 11, 2021 9:42 pm UrsusArctos wrote: I forgot that Kaworu was in a blue uniform when we saw him in the 3.0 trailer at the end of 2.0, and now I realize that he was wearing the Nerv commander uniform

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by FelipeFritschF » Sun Jul 11, 2021 10:11 pm I'm collecting more info in my trello, here: https://trello.com/c/xgOJh1Lj I've also took note we haven't coalesced information on the ANN radio show, the June cast greeting, the Utada/Anno stream, and more.

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by BusterMachine4 » Mon Jul 12, 2021 12:24 am YES, I KNEW IT! I told you guys that the 3.0 preview was a discarded plan for the actual movie, but did you listen? NO! You just acted like the preview was supposed to be some weird mindscrew and that 3.0's story was planned from the beginning! So there, I was right! How do you feel now? Okay, calming down for a moment, it seems like most of the stuff Anno says was in the original story for the movie we were already able to figure out: Kaji and Kaworu command a rebellion in NERV, Gendo and SEELE start the second phase of Third Impact, Kaji sacrifices his life to stop them. But it's interesting to find out that Gendo and Fuyutski actually left NERV for some reason, and that the "rebellion in NERV" was actually NERV itself. If I had to guess, I'd say that the infamous "donkey scene" was Gendo and Fuyutski looking at the corpse of one of the Adams (which would later become Eva 13), Kaji's NERV fought the 11th Angel in the middle of the movie, and SEELE used the 12th Angel to hijack Mark 6 and restart Third Impact. Over all, I do share people's frustrations with the time skip not being explored more. Even if seeing the events before 3.0 would make the movie's disorienting effect less powerful, it would be nice to see this scrapped plot as a movie in between 3.0 and 3.0+1.0, like with the Star Wars viewing order that puts the prequels after Empire Strikes Back. Without those events being shown, though, the Rebuild story feels somewhat incomplete.

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Mon Jul 12, 2021 1:00 am BusterMachine4 wrote: YES, I KNEW IT! I told you guys that the 3.0 preview was a discarded plan for the actual movie, but did you listen? NO! You just acted like the preview was supposed to be some weird mindscrew and that 3.0's story was planned from the beginning! So there, I was right! How do you feel now?

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 12, 2021 3:04 am Nuclear Lunchbox wrote: At the final stage greeting for Shin Eva, Director Anno said that in episode 20 of NGE, in the scene with Kaji and Misato where the camera focuses on the dresser, he told TV Tokyo, "It's a massage scene" in order to get permission to broadcast it.

[]: Re: Q's original story/stage greeting with Anno [split]             Quote Post by Konja7 » Mon Jul 12, 2021 4:55 am BusterMachine4 wrote: YES, I KNEW IT! I told you guys that the 3.0 preview was a discarded plan for the actual movie, but did you listen? NO! You just acted like the preview was supposed to be some weird mindscrew and that 3.0's story was planned from the beginning! So there, I was right! How do you feel now?

 says was in the original story for the movie we were already able to figure out: Kaji and Kaworu command a rebellion in NERV, Gendo and SEELE start the second phase of Third Impact, Kaji sacrifices his life to stop them. But it's interesting to find out that Gendo and Fuyutski actually left NERV for some reason, and that the "rebellion in NERV" was actually NERV itself. If I had to guess, I'd say that the infamous "donkey scene" was Gendo and Fuyutski looking at the corpse of one of the Adams (which would later become Eva 13), Kaji's NERV fought the 11th Angel in the middle of the movie, and SEELE used the 12th Angel to hijack Mark 6 and restart Third Impact. Over all, I do share people's frustrations with the time skip not being explored more. Even if seeing the events before 3.0 would make the movie's disorienting effect less powerful, it would be nice to see this scrapped plot as a movie in between 3.0 and 3.0+1.0, like with the Star Wars viewing order that puts the prequels after Empire Strikes Back. Without those events being shown, though, the Rebuild story feels somewhat incomplete.
